content: The 2024-2025 SOTA trend of structured, retrival-augmented active long-term memory for interactive agents can solve the core scaling flaw of intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM) and random network distillation (RND): uncurated repeated visits to trivial noisy states that do not advance long-term task learning. This leads to a new hybrid agent framework where memory actively prioritizes which unexplored states the agent should allocate curiosity to, rather than letting curiosity generate random unproductive exploration.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
